creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Most recent update of the tree makes net/openldap24-server fail to install and update due to an error, see below.


[...]
===>   Registering installation for openldap-sasl-server-2.4.39_4
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/ports/net/openldap24-server/work/stage/var/run/openldap/): No such file or directory
*** Error code 74
